name: betclic-ai
description: Assistant IA de paris sportifs pour Betclic

scripts.build: vite build && ENTRY=content vite build && ENTRY=background vite build
scripts.build:win: vite build && cross-env ENTRY=content vite build && cross-env ENTRY=background vite build
scripts.dev: concurrently "vite build --watch" "ENTRY=content vite build --watch" "ENTRY=background vite build --watch"
